title: stelis cuspidata
intro: Stelis cuspidata, also known as the Spur Orchid, is a type of flowering orchid native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stelis cuspidata include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Stelis cuspidata typically involve drying and processing the plant's leaves and roots to make teas, infusions, and capsules for medicinal use.
